ip_intent.one_line_desc: Open-source emulation model of the RRAM macro
ip_intent.one_paragraph_desc:
Open-source emulation model of the RRAM macro.
It supports a large data array and a small info array that are both emulated with prim_ram_1p.
It supports read and write commands.
Each read command returns 128b of data stored at a specific address in the RRAM.
The write command writes 128b of data to a store buffer which is emulated with a FIFO and writes
the content of the FIFO to the RRAM data or info array once the wr_last signal is set.

param_list.name: MaxWrWords
param_list.desc: Maximum number of words per write
